subcodes.first_line: Glorified be He Who hath appeared and revealed that which was hidden behind the veils of the Unseen and concealed in the eternity of eternities [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبحان الذی ظهر و اظهر ما کان مستورا فی حجب الغیب و مکنونا فی ازل الازال ان
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause, @praise and encouragement, @the concourse on high, @mysteries and their discovery; the mystical vision
